emergency_definition: fire or smoke damage within the last 24 hours

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: never leave the caller without a resolution

non_emergency_routing_rules: take detailed info and call back within 2 hours
integration_constraints: do not reference Xactimate to callers
do not reference RMS to callers
do not reference Encircle to callers
after_hours_flow_summary: Take emergency calls around the clock and non-emergency calls with detailed info for callback within 2 hours
office_hours_flow_summary: Office team available Monday through Friday 8am to 6pm Eastern for non-emergency calls
special_rules: note if caller says it's a rental property
flag if caller says the property is vacant or abandoned
call Jerome directly at 404-555-0612 if caller says FEMA or federal disaster declaration
notes: Rapid Response Restoration handles water damage, fire damage, and mold remediation in the Atlanta metro area with 24/7 emergency calls
greeting: Rapid Response Restoration, serving Atlanta and Charlotte

added: ask for city and zip code early in the call to determine market
flag if caller says the property is vacant or abandoned
call Jerome directly at 404-555-0612 if caller says FEMA or federal disaster declaration
